title: Snug Newborn Comfort
description: A soft, simple, and easy-to-use newborn-ready carrier designed for baby's first 12 months, providing ergonomic support and a close, comforting hold.
why_pip_picked_this: Consistently recommended for newborns due to its soft fabric, ease of use (3 clicks, no tying), and ergonomic design that supports healthy hip development. Ideal for the 1-3 month age band to promote bonding and provide hands-free comfort.
founder_lens: The Ergobaby Embrace is a strong contender for a top pick due to its high ratings and focus on newborn comfort and safety. Ensure the price and availability are consistently checked across major UK retailers.
safety_notes: Always follow recognised safe babywearing guidance and fit checks (TICKS guidelines).

best_for: back support and longer wearing sessions
title: Supportive & Comfortable Carry
description: A soft, flexible, and ergonomic baby carrier with a luxurious feel, featuring a waist belt, padded back support, and padded shoulder straps for ultimate comfort.
why_pip_picked_this: Highly rated for its excellent back support and comfort, making it suitable for parents who wear their baby for extended periods. It's designed for hip health and grows with the baby from newborn to 3 years.
founder_lens: The BabyBjörn Harmony is a premium option with strong focus on parent comfort and baby's hip health. The review count on John Lewis is low (26), but overall sentiment from other sources (Mumsnet) is very positive. The rating of 4.6 is from John Lewis, and Mumsnet gave it 4.5 stars.
safety_notes: Always follow recognised safe babywearing guidance and fit checks.

best_for: budget-friendly, close contact, and early newborn stage
title: Soft & Snug Wrap
description: A soft and stretchy cotton-blend wrap designed for newborns and infants, providing a comforting hold and even weight distribution across the wearer's back and shoulders.
why_pip_picked_this: An excellent budget-friendly option for parents seeking the close, comforting contact of a wrap. Suitable from birth (2.3kg) and machine washable. While it requires some practice to tie, it's highly rated for comfort and effectiveness in settling newborns.
founder_lens: The Izmi Essential Wrap is a strong budget pick. Note that some reviews mention it can be warm in summer and requires practice to tie correctly. Ensure clear instructions or links to tutorials are provided.
safety_notes: Always follow recognised safe babywearing guidance and fit checks (TICKS guidelines).; Fit indoors to prevent fabric from touching the floor.

product_name: Omni 360 Cool Air Mesh Baby Carrier
title: Versatile All-in-One Carrier
description: A four-position, newborn-ready carrier designed for baby's first 48 months, offering patented ergonomic support and a breathable mesh fabric for comfort in all seasons.
why_pip_picked_this: This carrier is highly versatile, suitable from birth without an infant insert, and offers four carrying positions. The Cool Air Mesh makes it ideal for the UK's varying climate, and its ergonomic design supports healthy hip development. It's a great all-rounder for parents seeking a long-term solution.
founder_lens: The Ergobaby Omni 360 is a popular and well-regarded carrier. The review count on John Lewis is relatively low, but overall sentiment from other sources (Mumsnet) is very positive. Ensure the price and availability are checked across major UK retailers.
safety_notes: Always follow recognised safe babywearing guidance and fit checks (TICKS guidelines).

best_for: micro-adjustability and longevity from newborn to toddler
title: Adjustable Grow-With-Me Carrier
description: An all-in-one adjustable baby carrier that offers comfort and support for newborns and toddlers, featuring micro-adjustments for a perfect fit as your baby grows.
why_pip_picked_this: The Boba X is highly praised for its exceptional adjustability, making it suitable from birth (7lbs) through to toddlerhood (45lbs) without the need for an infant insert. Its soft, breathable fabric and ergonomic design ensure comfort for both baby and wearer, making it a long-lasting and versatile choice.
founder_lens: The Boba X has a strong reputation for adjustability and comfort. The price point is competitive for a carrier with such a long lifespan. The review count is high, and I've estimated a 4.7 rating based on general positive sentiment across reviews.
safety_notes: Always follow recognised safe babywearing guidance and fit checks.
